restaurant.name: Romeo & Vine
restaurant.tagline: Family tables, Italian plates, and a cellar worth lingering over.

dailySpecials.label: Tonight's special
dailySpecials.name: Osso Buco al Limone
dailySpecials.description: Slow-braised veal shank, saffron risotto, gremolata, and a pour of Barbera from the cellar.

dailySpecials.label: Wine bar pick
dailySpecials.name: Northern Italy Flight
dailySpecials.description: Three two-ounce pours — Prosecco, Pinot Grigio delle Venezie, and Valpolicella Classico.

items.name: Bruschetta al Pomodoro
items.description: Grilled country bread, heirloom tomatoes, basil, aged balsamic.

items.name: Burrata & Prosciutto
items.description: Creamy burrata, San Daniele prosciutto, grilled peach, pistachio.

items.name: Calamari Fritti
items.description: Lightly fried, chili aioli, lemon, parsley.

items.name: Cacio e Pepe
items.description: Handmade tonnarelli, Pecorino Romano, cracked Tellicherry pepper.

items.name: Pappardelle al Ragù
items.description: Wide ribbons, slow beef & pork ragù, Parmigiano Reggiano.

items.name: Linguine allo Scoglio
items.description: Mussels, clams, shrimp, garlic, white wine, chili flake.

items.name: Pollo al Mattone
items.description: Brick-pressed half chicken, rosemary potatoes, salsa verde.

items.name: Salmone al Forno
items.description: Roasted Atlantic salmon, fennel, citrus, olive oil.

items.name: Bistecca Fiorentina
items.description: Grilled ribeye for two, arugula, lemon, sea salt. Market cut.

items.name: Panna Cotta
items.description: Vanilla bean, macerated berries, pistachio crumb.
